name: PlaceOrder
purpose: Execute the complete place order workflow: validate stock, charge payment, reserve inventory, create order record, send notification.
behavior: Calls validation, payment, inventory, order creation, and notification functions in sequence with rollback on failure.

semantic_inputs.name: order_data
semantic_inputs.description: Order payload with items, payment_method, shipping_address

semantic_outputs.name: order_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result with success, order_id, status, message

postconditions: If success, order record created with status 'confirmed'
If failure, no side effects remain

inputs.name: order_data
inputs.description: Order payload with items (list), payment_method (str), shipping_address (dict)

outputs.name: order_result
outputs.description: Result with success (bool), order_id (str), status (str), message (str)

global_vars.description: Create new order record and update status
Read stock levels, decrement stock, increment reserved
Create payment record and charge payment

data_operations.description: Read stock, decrement stock, reserve items

constraints.description: Must rollback all changes if any step fails
Payment must be charged before inventory is decremented

acceptance_criteria.description: Order is created with status 'confirmed' on success
No side effects remain on failure

name: CancelOrder
purpose: Execute the cancel order workflow: verify order exists and not shipped, refund payment, restore inventory, update order status.
behavior: Calls verification, refund, inventory restoration, and status update functions in sequence with rollback on failure.

in_scope: verifying order exists and not shipped

semantic_outputs.name: order_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result with success, order_id, status, message

postconditions: If success, order status set to 'cancelled'
If failure, no side effects remain

outputs.name: order_result
outputs.description: Result with success (bool), order_id (str), status (str), message (str)

global_vars.description: Read order details, update status to cancelled
Restore inventory by incrementing stock and decrementing reserved

data_operations.description: Read order, update status to cancelled

constraints.description: Must verify order exists and is not shipped before cancelling
Must rollback all changes if any step fails

acceptance_criteria.description: Order status updated to 'cancelled' on success
Payment refunded and inventory restored on success
No side effects remain on failure

name: TrackOrder
purpose: Return current order status and estimated delivery time for a given order.
behavior: Looks up order by order_id in orders data store and returns status and estimated delivery time.

semantic_outputs.name: order_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result with success, order_id, status, message including delivery time

postconditions: Order data is read, not modified

outputs.name: order_result
outputs.description: Result with success (bool), order_id (str), status (str), message (str) including delivery time

global_vars.description: Not directly needed but available for read if required
Not directly needed but available for read if required

data_operations.description: Read order status and estimated delivery time
Read inventory if needed for delivery estimation
Read payment status if needed for tracking

constraints.description: Must not modify any data store

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns current order status and estimated delivery time
